headline: Glass House Brands Announces the Filing of Shelf Prospectus and At-The-Market Distribution Program
summary: LONG BEACH, Calif. and TORONTO, June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Glass House Brands Inc. (“Glass House” or the “Company”) (CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U) (CBOE CA: GLAS.WT.U) (OTCQX: GLASF) (OTCQX:GHBWF) announced today that it has filed a short form base shelf prospectus (the “Shelf Prospectus”) dated June 10, 2026 with the securities regulatory authorities in all provinces and territories of Canada.
